name: feishu-bot
description: Local-first Feishu bot with pluggable diagnostic HTTP components.

scripts.build: python3 -c "import os, shutil, stat; exec(\"def onerror(func, path, exc_info):\\n    try:\\n        os.chmod(path, stat.S_IWRITE | stat.S_IREAD | stat.S_IEXEC)\\n    except OSError:\\n        pass\\n    try:\\n        func(path)\\n    except Exception:\\n        pass\"); shutil.rmtree('dist', ignore_errors=False, onerror=onerror) if os.path.exists('dist') else None" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.dev:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift run --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp
scripts.build:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift build --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release
scripts.start:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift run --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release
scripts.package:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift build --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release && node scripts/package-native-mac-app.mjs
